summary: Reworked quality scaling to reduce GPU cost via three levers (pixel ratio, point count, shader complexity) while preserving full-screen canvas. Added shaderComplexity, noiseOctaves, enablePointerRepulsion, and enableSlowModulation to QualityProfile. Vertex shaders now conditionally execute noise octaves (1/2/3), pointer repulsion, and slow modulation based on uniforms. Added GPU context loss/restore handlers for mobile crash prevention. All 505 tests pass including 10 new T-036-* tests.
